summary: Tested admin dashboard UI fixes - ALL 3 ISSUES VERIFIED AS FIXED

search_bar_hidden_on_admin.description: Search bar is correctly hidden when admin user is on /admin pages. The isAdminPage check in Header.js (line 57-60) works correctly.
search_bar_hidden_on_admin.evidence: data-testid='search-input' element not found on admin page

bottom_nav_hidden_on_admin.description: MobileNav (bottom navigation bar) is correctly hidden when admin user is on /admin pages. The isAdminPage check in MobileNav.js (lines 42-45) returns null correctly.
bottom_nav_hidden_on_admin.evidence: No nav items with data-testid='nav-*' visible, nav.fixed.bottom-10 element not found

admin_notifications_filtered.description: Notifications dropdown shows only admin-related notifications (support tickets). Backend correctly filters by context='admin' to show only ADMIN_NOTIFICATION_TYPES.
admin_notifications_filtered.evidence: Notifications showed '🎫 تذكرة دعم جديدة' (New support ticket) - admin-specific notifications, not customer order notifications

test_credentials.admin: phone=0911111111, password=admin123 (note: password change modal appeared during test)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 admin dashboard UI fixes verified. Search bar hidden, bottom nav hidden, and notifications filtered correctly for admin users on /admin pages. Note: Admin account may prompt for password change.

bottom_navigation.test: Check nav.fixed.bottom-10 and nav items visibility on /admin

notifications_filtering.test: Open notifications dropdown on admin page and verify content
notifications_filtering.result: PASS - Shows support ticket notifications (admin type), no customer order notifications
